question: How does a UA operator manage his/her own fatigue level and what are the techniques?

options.text: By consuming more energy drinks and tablets to maintain its fatigue level.
Consuming alcohol, the day before the UAS operation to have a deeper sleep.
Managing own sleeping patterns on intervals, for example two hours of sleep and 1 hour of activity.
Ensure adequate rest and sleep, a well-balanced diet, cutting back on caffeine and exercise regularly.
